ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the course (e.g., In-Person, Industry-Focused) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the course content */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the course in USD */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the course in days */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the instructor of the course */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the course */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the course */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of participants the course can accommodate */,
  "current_enrollment" INTEGER /* Current number of participants enrolled */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the course is held (if in-person) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the course is currently available for enrollment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for account security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., participant, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the user */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the user */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the user */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Whether the user has administrative privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cart" (
  "cart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cart entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who added the course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Course ID that has been added to the cart */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date when the course was added to the cart */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Number of courses added to the cart */,
  "is_purchased" INTEGER /* Whether the course has been purchased from the cart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cart_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cart_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order this item belongs to */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course ordered */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the course at the time of purchase */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Number of courses ordered */,
  "is_refunded" INTEGER /* Whether the course has been refunded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the reviewer */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the course (e.g., 1 to 5 stars) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comments provided by the user */,
  "date_submitted" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Whether the feedback is anonymous */,
  "is_recommended" INTEGER /* Whether the user recommends the course */,
  "helpful_count" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the feedback helpful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the instructor */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the instructor */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)
